finding: Cassette became generic `Cassette<TResponses>` (default Record); ModuleGallery<TResponses> carries it. The compile-time cassette-shape check is preserved at the AUTHORING site via the app's binding alias (support/types.ts: `type Cassette = GCassette<ApiEndpointResponses>`). PROVEN: scratch `cassette: { 'Assistant.list': 12345 }` fails `error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'CassetteEntry<AssistantListResponse>'`. Runtime fns take Cassette<any> (type-erased) so the app's strict cassette assigns cleanly.

End-to-end Playwright smoke of the rewired standalone gallery: 43 pages + 47 overlays + 17 deep + 99 seeded enumerated via the injected glob (matches ziee's pre-move counts); 72 story sections; auth page renders loaded with 0 console errors; an overlay open-state renders; browse canvas 0 console errors; prod marker `ZIEE_GALLERY_SEED_MARKER` present. mountGallery is behaviorally identical to main.tsx+seed.ts.

Prod-exclusion invariant preserved: the `data-gallery-build-marker="ZIEE_GALLERY_SEED_MARKER"` JSX literal is a FIXED string in the package (survives minification); gallery.config.json `prodMarker` defaults to the identical value so check-gallery-prod-exclusion.mjs greps for the emitted marker. The whole gallery is reachable ONLY via the DEV-gated dev-gallery lazy chunk (dev-gallery/module.tsx `import.meta.env.DEV`); nothing ships to prod. Marker read live in the smoke.

import.meta.glob (Vite-only, can't cross a package boundary) STAYS app-side; the discovered DiscoveredGallery[] is injected via mountGallery({discoverGalleries}). The pure merge/assert (mergeModuleCassettes/assertUniqueSlugs/moduleNameFromPath) moved to registry-core.ts (package) and is unit-tested (3 relocated tests, 11 assertions PASS). Collision-throw + unique-slug invariants intact.

Eager synchronous assembly preserved: mountGallery calls initSurfaces(discoverGalleries()) THEN configureMockApi THEN installMockApi THEN seedAuth+loadModules — the cassette is fully merged BEFORE any store fires a load, exactly as the pre-move support/registry module-eval → seed.ts order. The app's glob is still EAGER ({eager:true}).

All 12 former `@/` couplings resolve to GalleryConfig fields assembled in ONE app file: apiEndpoints, loadModules, seedAuth, useRoutesStore, ThemeProvider, ErrorBoundary(AppErrorBoundary), Loading, LazyComponentRenderer, accents/accentLabels/defaultAccent, setThemePref/setAccentPref, stories(ALL_STORIES), paramValues(providerId), deepState(ConversationPage), specialRoutes(SSE/PDF/text), crawlCassette, surfaceAuthSeed. ui tsc=0 — every DI field type-checks against the real component/hook.

The 36 modules/*/gallery.tsx import ONLY from `@/dev/gallery/support` (94 content importers) — byte-UNCHANGED. The barrel re-exports the ziee-bound types (from ./types) + lazy/hold (from @ziee/gallery). fixtures/**, stories/** (via ../story shim), coverage.ts, generated files, allowlists all import unchanged relative paths kept as thin shims (mockApi.ts, story.tsx, GalleryPage.tsx). Zero churn to content.

Desktop's only cross-workspace breakage was the deleted @/dev/gallery/support/registry-core (module-seed.ts import). Restored as a re-export shim to @ziee/gallery. MODULE_CASSETTE/MODULE_GALLERIES stay exported for the desktop cross-workspace cassette bridge. Desktop tsc=0; desktop local framework copies compile + behave identically. Full desktop mountGallery rewire declared as follow-up (BOUNDARY B-3).

gate-ui.mjs + runtime-health.mjs re-homed to @ziee/gallery/scripts, parameterized over gallery.config.json (galleryDir/port/galleryUrl/runtimeBaselineModule/devCmd/visualConfig/visualSpecs/lintCmds) via resolveGalleryConfig(). Defaults = ziee's exact historical values. VERIFIED: the package runtime-health, run from ui/ against the live rewired gallery scoped to `hub`, loaded gallery.config.json + the runtimeBaselineModule, enumerated all surfaces, audited 7/7 cells, reported hub clean (0 gating HIGH). ziee's `gate:ui`+`gallery:runtime` npm scripts repointed to the package copies.
Pure frontend extraction. `git status` shows ZERO changes to any api-client/types.ts, openapi.json, or Rust file. No schemars/aide/route change. E8 trivially byte-identical — no regen needed.

The 3 node --test unit files that exercise moved pure code (registry-core merge/assert/moduleName; hold durability; mockApi-binary bytes) relocated into the package with import paths already matching the new dirs. `node --test` = 11 pass / 0 fail. The .test.ts companions travel with the code they test.

@ziee/gallery tsc --noEmit = 0; ziee ui tsc = 0; desktop ui tsc = 0. Package peerDeps {@ziee/framework,@ziee/kit,react,react-dom,react-router-dom}; src-export convention (main: src/index.ts) mirrors kit/framework. Ambient env.d.ts declares import.meta.env.DEV + *.css (followed transitively into kit).
